Please bring this back! We bought a VR just for this game and we can't find it now. It's the only reason we bought the Meta Quest. Please it's the only game our son wants. It calms him when he's upset.
For whatever reason, this fun little vr pet has had its severs shut down. Will there ever be another Vr pet like this unique pet? Time will tell. Maybe there's one out already.
This game used to make me feel peaceful I wished it was up and functioning and stuff again

Please don’t remove it! I love this game so much! Even though I have like over 60 games, this makes me feel comfortable and enjoyable it makes me happy to have a cute virtual pet while playing it. Even though I’m from a new gen, I feel sad if you’re going to remove it. I’ve seen people write reviews about this and I wanted to! This also makes people, and kids sad so please, please, please don’t remove it.
Really liked but ended too soon need part 2

Bogo watches me sleep, I see him everywhere I go. I don’t leave the house anymore, otherwise he’ll get me. He won’t stop following me, he always want to play fetch licks his lips with human teeth and tongue. I can’t stop playing or he’ll hurt my family. Please send help.
You can’t throw at all in this game
Is boring and if you throw the stick it sometimes won’t get it and I don’t have a big house/rooms in my house so update it is so boring
If you are short you might get scared the first time when you see the size of the pet but it is cute love the look of the pet and game! Great game!
I love it so much, I wish it would be a full game, or ongoing so he remembers you !

reviews.review_title: I love Bogo! I want more!!!
reviews.review_description: Bogo is brilliant! Please don’t take Bogo away! We need more Bogo, NOT less!!! The sensations and the interactions are wonderful! Bogo is an incredible virtual pet and so adorably entertaining! I would give five stars if I could roam around the different environments created with Bogo!!! And (since I’m reaching for the stars) if Bogo would remember me when I return and we could build on the interactions!!!!

The game doesn’t work well on my new oculus 2.. can’t get it to do much of anything just on the first screen… I requested a refund but apparently didn’t get it… It seems like it would be a cute game just didn’t work on my oculus.. I tried to couple of different times and then I gave up. ￼ like I said looks like a really cute game just doesn’t work on my machine? ￼
This game sucks

This game has my dog worried...
Seriously the game is well made my only suggestion would be hand tracking and customization of bogo.
 I would like to see a bogo park like for dogs where people could watch other's bogo and sit and chat.

This is super for little kids. Cutest little guy to help Newbies and Slowbies like me. Brand new and trying to learn what the buttons do. It's nice slow pace for me, my fingers don't always comply with what my brain tells them to do.

I love this little mini game. Not 5 stars only because I wish I could do more with the little creature. It’s very cute and entertaining  and I have definitely played it more then once. My daughter is 13 and played it more then once as well. I will definitely play the update if there is one and a #2 if one comes out.

First, I found this most fun when I had a lot of space to freely test walking around in virtual reality for the first time. I recommend playing it in an environment of at least 6x6’ for a more immersive experience.

Bogo is an excellent test environment, so it was a fantastic idea to include it with the Quest starter lineup.  It really helped show me what the Quest can do with freely walking, reaching and generally interacting with an artificial environment and AI in 3D for the first time.

Shout out to the team of Bogo for that awesome and touching easter egg, btw. I was just experimenting when it suddenly  was discovered, and I actually wanted to sit there and study the proud faces of those who brought this idea and all its elements to reality. Thanks for helping me learn vr and the Quest in such an engaging way.  

It’s a short but memorable experience and one I found myself coming back to despite Bogo not remembering me. I think if this was a full scale game where a creature and I explore the world and interact together in a similar fashion for a lasting experience the creature remembers, I’m pretty sure I’d have to buy that in a heartbeat!

Hoping to one day see a “from the team who brought you Bogo” ad for a full game.

I'm not giving it 5 stars only because it is such a short play through. Bogo is cute and fun and relaxing I just wish there were more to this game, I would be willing to pay! Brings back nostalgia of my tamagotchi back in the 90s! Wish this was longer play like that. Tons of fun def reccomend!

Just started this! I’m an adult that can’t have pets and this really helps me relax when I just want to wind down after work . I wish there were more places to explore and take bogo for a walk. Overall this pet is SUPER ADORABLE!!!

reviews.review_title: A demo by any other name's just as sweet
reviews.review_description:
First off let me say that this was the First VR game I played on my new Quest (after the "First Steps" app, of course); I thoroughly enjoyed my first two playthroughs. The graphics are bright, cartoonish, and entirely serviceable given the hardware on the quest. The minigames are intuitive. The dessert cooker is a fun mechanic. The monster is energetic and cute. The problem is, those two playthroughs lasted all of an hour, combined: 

This isn't actually a full game; it's a vertical slice demo for a Tamagotchi-type game akin to the Chao Garden levels from the Sonic Adventure games for the Dreamcast or the Monster Rancher series on the PS1 & PS2. The ideas are clearly there:

- Attract various creatures with treats/food/toys
- Care for their bodily needs as they grow/age
- Train their stats by playing minigames
- Complete cooperative skill challenges and tournaments
-Repair ruins to unock additional altars/areas
- Acquire raw ingredients to cook special desserts/potions
- Change to diet changes attributes/size

I'm giving this three stars because I was entertained for an hour for free, but don't be fooled into thinking there is anything here for you in the long run. That said, I want to end on a positive note:

I really hope the developers finish this game. Once it's published, I'll definitely pick up a copy. Well done, people!

3 stars, mostly for false advertising. This really should have been labeled as a demo.

This is a cute game but to short, I would love to see more added to this game or possibly a upgrade for more gameplay passed what is already in the game. I would also love to see a possibly to save the game.
This is a very good game 10/10 recommended
It will just make you smile. Fun even if you have no hand eye coordination.
From the developer’s description I thought it would be a limited experience but there are a lot of mini games and my kids have been playing it for a long time. Maybe they just really want a dog?

Such a cute game. Like everyone else said I wish it was longer. The graphics are really good. I would love to be able to do more things with Bogo he is the cutest. Please make this game longer. I would pay decent money if you would add to it!

reviews.review_title: My 5yo is in love with Bogo
reviews.review_description: She is so excited to see, feed and throw sticks for bogo. We use it as a motivation for schoolwork and other activities like piano practice.
This was my first and favorite introduction to vr
